ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "loinc_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each test (LOINC number) */,
  "long_common_name" TEXT /* Common name describing the test */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of the test (e.g., lab test, imaging) */,
  "category" INTEGER /* Category that the test belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the test */,
  "clinical_significance" TEXT /* Clinical significance or importance of the test */,
  "recommended_frequency" TEXT /* Recommended frequency for performing the test */,
  "standardization_status" TEXT /* Status of the test in terms of standardization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test was last updated */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the test_sources table to indicate the source of the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loinc_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES test_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES test_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parts" (
  "part_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each part of a test */,
  "part_name" TEXT /* Name of the part */,
  "part_code_system" TEXT /* Code system used for the part */,
  "part_type" TEXT /* Type of the part (e.g., component, property) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the part */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the part */,
  "range" TEXT /* Normal range for the part */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the part was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the part was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_types" (
  "part_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each part type */,
  "part_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the part type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the part type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the part type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the part type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "link_types" (
  "link_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link type */,
  "link_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the link type (e.g., Primary, Secondary) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the link type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the link type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the link type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "property_link" TEXT /* Link to the property definition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the property */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the property was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the property was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_parts" (
  "test_loinc_number" TEXT /* LOINC number of the test */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number associated with the test */,
  "link_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the link type between test and part */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_loinc_number", "part_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_parts_link_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("link_type_id") REFERENCES link_types ("link_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, technician, researcher) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device accessing the system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source system */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the source system */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the source system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_relationships" (
  "test_id_1" TEXT /* First test identifier (LOINC number) */,
  "test_id_2" TEXT /* Second test identifier (LOINC number) */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., similar, complementary) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id_1", "test_id_2")
)
